title: I hope this Free AI forex chart analysis tool helps anyone out there
author: Any_Training_8582
selftext:
Hey fellow forex traders!   
I just finished building a Free SaaS that directly analyses TradingView charts — no screenshots, no uploads, just load your chart and it works automatically.

It supports all Forex pairs, major Commodities (Gold, Oil, Silver), and top Indices (S&P 500, NASDAQ, DAX).

The website also offers 10+ free tools to help you trade smarter and more profitably: Journal, Calendar News, Notes, Trading Plan Manager, Account Manager, AI Mentor, AI Analytics Journal, AI Psychology Assistant, AI Vision, Market Sessions Tracker, Forex & Futures Calculators, MT4/MT5 Trade Import, Backtesting Tracker, Mind Maps, Auto Execution MT4/MT5, and Auto Risk Management.  
All in One

 Try it here: [myforexai.com](https://myforexai.com/)
